coreJobStatement: Design, manufacture, and deliver precision surgical and medical instruments that enable clinicians to perform diagnostic, therapeutic, and interventional procedures with controlled force, accurate positioning, and repeatable ergonomic handling [SRC: VN_medical_instruments]
productJobStatement: Help Instrument Material Production to supply precision-drawn, near-net-shape stainless steel instrument profile stock at +-0.02 mm dimensional tolerance and controlled hardness potential (hardenable to 50-60 HRC) with biocompatible as-drawn surface (Ra <= 0.4 um) — consistently across batches — for instrument forging, machining, and finishing
anchorLevel: L5 (material — instrument-grade steel profile / bar stock within L6a)
lPath: L7 Surgical & Medical Instrument Ecosystem > L6a Instrument Material Production > L5 Instrument-Grade Steel Profile / Bar Stock

segments.name: Premium Reusable Instrument OEM
segments.characteristics: High-end reusable instruments at medium volume; tightest metallurgical and finish requirements; ISO 13485 + MDR compliance
segments.targetabilityReason: Non-standard geometries and tight metallurgy create profile demand
segments.circumstance: High-end reusable instruments at medium volume; tightest metallurgical and finish requirements; ISO 13485 + MDR compliance
segments.alternativesDiffer: Yes — drop-forged blank dominant; custom profile for non-standard geometries

segments.name: Tuttlingen Instrument Cluster (SME contract manufacturers)
segments.characteristics: Medium-low volume; diverse instrument catalog; cost-sensitive
segments.targetabilityReason: Standard bar stock dominant; limited custom profile adoption currently
segments.circumstance: 400+ SME instrument makers in Tuttlingen/Sialkot; medium-low volume; diverse instrument catalog; cost-sensitive
segments.alternativesDiffer: Yes — standard bar stock dominant; limited custom profile adoption

segments.name: Endoscopic / MIS Instrument Maker
segments.characteristics: Thin-wall tubular shafts at high precision; growing volume; OD 3-10 mm
segments.targetabilityReason: Precision tube stock dominant; profiled tube/channel for instrument tips
segments.circumstance: Thin-wall tubular shafts at high precision; growing volume; OD 3-10 mm
segments.alternativesDiffer: Yes — precision tube stock dominant; Swiss-lathe from bar; profiled tube for tips

segments.name: Sterilization Tray Maker
segments.characteristics: Stainless steel profiles for tray rails and dividers; standardized cross-sections; high volume
segments.targetabilityReason: Standard stainless profiles dominant; custom channel profiles for locking
segments.circumstance: Stainless steel profiles for tray rails and dividers; standardized cross-sections; high volume
segments.alternativesDiffer: Yes — standard stainless profiles dominant; custom channel profiles for locking

alternatives.name: Custom cold-drawn precision stainless steel instrument profile (near-net-shape)
alternatives.tradeoffs: 6-12 week tooling lead time for new geometry; >=100 kg min batch; limited to stainless/alloy steel; requires ISO 10993 biocompatibility documentation from supplier

alternatives.name: Standard stainless steel round/flat/hex bar stock (full machining in-house)
alternatives.tradeoffs: 40-70% material waste; high machining cost; in-house CNC capacity required; widely available from multiple distributors; ~55% market share

alternatives.name: Drop-forged instrument blank (closed-die, near-net-shape)
alternatives.tradeoffs: Forging die investment 5-20K EUR; forging-specific surface texture requires full finishing; limited geometry flexibility per die; ~20% share

alternatives.name: MIM (metal injection molding) pre-form (small/complex parts)
alternatives.tradeoffs: Size-limited (< 50 g typical); shrinkage tolerance +-0.3%; debinding and sintering add process steps; growing for disposable and endoscopic; ~10% share

alternatives.name: Do nothing — continue with current bar stock supplier (status quo)
alternatives.tradeoffs: Zero switching cost; zero qualification effort; hidden cost in material waste and CNC capacity tied up

jobSteps.description: Specify instrument material: steel grade, cross-section geometry, tolerance class, hardness potential, surface finish, biocompatibility requirements
jobSteps.sensorDependencyRationale: Material spec drives die design, grade selection, and downstream processing pathway
jobSteps.rawStatement: Specify instrument material: steel grade, cross-section geometry, tolerance class, hardness potential, surface finish, biocompatibility requirements
jobSteps.rationale: Material specification drives die design, grade selection, and downstream processing pathway

jobSteps.description: Identify and qualify medical-grade steel profile supplier; ISO 13485 supplier audit + ISO 10993 biocompatibility file required
jobSteps.sensorDependencyRationale: Supplier qualification for medical device material is a multi-month barrier
jobSteps.rawStatement: Identify and qualify medical-grade steel profile supplier; ISO 13485 supplier audit + ISO 10993 biocompatibility file required
jobSteps.rationale: Supplier qualification for medical device material supply is a multi-month barrier

jobSteps.description: Incoming inspection: dimensional check, hardness spot-check, material certificate verification, surface roughness measurement per batch
jobSteps.sensorDependencyRationale: Every incoming batch must pass inspection gates before release to machining
jobSteps.rawStatement: Incoming inspection: dimensional check, hardness spot-check, material certificate verification, surface roughness measurement per batch
jobSteps.rationale: Every incoming batch must pass inspection gates before release to machining

jobSteps.description: Pre-machining release decision: batch compliant with purchase spec? Material certificate traceable? Biocompatibility file current?
jobSteps.sensorDependencyRationale: Release decision gates all downstream processing
jobSteps.rawStatement: Pre-machining release decision: batch compliant with purchase spec? Material certificate traceable? Biocompatibility file current?
jobSteps.rationale: Release decision gates all downstream processing

jobSteps.description: Profile stock dimensional consistency and metallurgical uniformity drive machining productivity, forging quality, and heat-treatment response
jobSteps.sensorDependencyRationale: Profile stock properties directly affect downstream processing outcomes
jobSteps.rawStatement: Profile stock dimensional consistency and metallurgical uniformity drive machining productivity, forging quality, and heat-treatment response
jobSteps.rationale: Profile stock properties directly affect downstream machining productivity and heat-treatment response

jobSteps.description: Track batch-to-batch drift in profile dimensions, surface finish, grain structure, and inclusion content
jobSteps.sensorDependencyRationale: Drift detection prevents propagation of metallurgical variability into finished instruments
jobSteps.rawStatement: Track batch-to-batch drift in profile dimensions, surface finish, grain structure, and inclusion content
jobSteps.rationale: Drift detection prevents propagation of metallurgical variability into finished instruments
